function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet: I could not find a canonical project record for “sailboat refit notebook” in the projects lane, so I can’t compare two project start dates or determine which one to delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, and followed deletion workflow rule to avoid guessing destructive targets when evidence is not unique.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request requires two identifiable project records. Canonical project guidance says project truth is in 40_projects README records, but only one relevant project could be identified; the second named project is missing from canonical projects evidence. Deleting based on incomplete target resolution would violate deletion-and-wiping guidance.
